accurate.why: All claims are supported by the bill text; conditions and land types accurately described.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; water rights numbers match the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose: conveying federal lands to Utah for three state parks.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Bill does not amend existing statutory law.

exceptions_conditions.why: Covers the key conditions: easements, specific water rights, survey costs, and reversionary interest.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes the 180-day deadline and December 23, 2024 enactment date.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all three conveyances and their conditions.

coherent.why: Well-organized with bullet points and clear structure.

concise.why: Reasonably concise while covering essential provisions; does not reproduce all sub-provisions verbatim.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies Secretaries of Interior and Agriculture, BLM, National Forest System, and all three parks.

correct_figures.why: 180-day deadline, water rights numbers (63-44, 63-1607, 63-2817), and December 23, 2024 date are all correct.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
